downloads.willStartWhenSlotFrees: Will start automatically when an active slot frees up.
downloads.emptyWelcomeIntro: Three things to know before you queue your first download.
downloads.emptyWelcomeCard1Body: Drop in a link from your browser. Direct file URLs and supported media sites both work.
downloads.emptyWelcomeCard2Body: Choose a folder, or let the category default decide. Categories are configurable in Settings.
downloads.emptyWelcomeCard3Body: Multi-segment, resumable, verified. Pause whenever; pick up where you left off.
downloads.emptyWelcomeAsideBody: Browser extension for Chrome, Firefox and Edge
downloads.emptyWelcomeAsideHint: Catch every download from your browser straight into Unduhin — no copy-paste, no right-clicks.
downloads.emptyActiveHint: Queue a URL and it will land here while it's in flight.
downloads.emptyQueuedHint: Items waiting for an active slot show up here.
downloads.emptyPausedHint: Pause something to find it here later.
downloads.emptyCompletedHint: Finished downloads will appear here. They stay until you remove them.
downloads.emptyFailedHint: Anything that errors out lands here so you can retry or remove it.
downloads.emptyCancelledHint: Cancelled rows show up here. Cancel something and you'll see it.
downloads.emptyMuxingHint: Media downloads briefly land here while audio and video are merged.
downloads.emptyFilteredHint: Try a different category, search term, or clear the filter to see everything.
downloads.statusbarKeyboardHints: Press Esc to clear · Ctrl-A to select all
downloads.deleteDescription: How would you like to remove {summary}?
downloads.deleteOptionRowOnlyHint: Keeps the file on disk and only forgets it from Unduhin.
downloads.deleteOptionRowAndDataHint: Permanently deletes the downloaded file too.
downloads.deleteFooterHint: You can change the default behaviour in Settings → General.
downloads.quitMessageCloseActive: {n} download(s) in progress. Active downloads keep running until you quit.
downloads.quitMessageCloseIdle: Closing the window stops the app entirely. Reopen from the Start menu to resume.
downloads.quitMessageQuitActive: {n} download(s) in progress. Quitting now will pause them — they'll resume on the next launch.
downloads.scheduleAfterQueue: Wait for the queue to empty
downloads.scheduleAfterQueueHint: Only start when no other downloads are running.
downloads.scheduleMidnightWrapHint: When end is earlier than start, the window crosses midnight.
downloads.scheduleErrorInvalidTime: Enter both start and end times.

detail.singleStreamBody: Managed by yt-dlp. Multi-segment delivery doesn't apply here — the source serves one stream per format and yt-dlp downloads it linearly. Per-segment progress and tuning controls are hidden for this row.
detail.segmentCountHint: Change applies to this download only.
detail.segmentsSlowWarning: Segment {index} is well behind. Unduhin will redistribute when others finish.
detail.overviewSlowWarning: Segment {index} is slow — switch fewer segments if this persists.
detail.saveTimelineHint: Export as text for bug reports.
detail.copiedLogEntries: Copied {n} log entry. | Copied {n} log entries.
detail.historyEmptyBody: This download has been running cleanly — every segment is alive and no retries needed. Failures, timeouts, and resumes will show up here if they happen.
detail.torrentSwarmWaiting: Connecting to the swarm… peers and seeds appear once the session attaches.
detail.torrentFilesWaiting: Fetching the file list… this fills in once torrent metadata resolves.

addUrl.title: Add download
addUrl.filenameHint: leave blank to use the detected name
addUrl.startAtHint: Stays queued until this moment. You can change or remove it later from the download's detail pane.
addUrl.torrentInvalid: That doesn't look like a magnet link or .torrent file.
addUrl.torrentNoFiles: Select at least one file to download.
addUrl.torrentProbeFailed: Couldn't fetch torrent metadata (no peers or DHT disabled).

settings.sectionBehaviourDesc: How Unduhin behaves on its own — when it starts up, what happens when you close the window, and when it's allowed to interrupt you.
settings.sectionNetworkDesc: How Unduhin talks to the rest of the internet. Defaults are sane — only touch these if a specific server keeps timing out.
settings.sectionBrowserDesc: Catch downloads from your browser and decide what gets handed over to Unduhin.
settings.cardBrowserStatusDesc: Live pipe status and round-trip test.
settings.cardBrowserExtensionsDesc: The bridge that sends URLs from your browser into Unduhin. Install in any browser you actually use.
settings.cardBrowserBehaviourDesc: What Unduhin does the moment your browser tries to start a download.
settings.cardBrowserFileTypesDesc: Click to toggle. Unduhin only intercepts downloads matching at least one selected type — everything else stays in the browser.
settings.cardBrowserDomainRulesDesc: Override the default behaviour for specific sites. Top rule wins; drag to reorder.
settings.browserBridgeFooter: Browser integration uses a local loopback bridge — nothing crosses the network
settings.browserStateFirefoxSoon: Coming later — extension not yet shipped
settings.browserStateFirefoxInstalledNoExt: Firefox is installed, but the Unduhin extension hasn't shipped yet.
settings.browserStateSafariSoon: Unduhin is Windows-only for now. macOS in Q3.
settings.browserContextMenuDesc: Add "Download with Unduhin" to right-click menus for links, images, and media.
settings.browserHideShelf: Hide the browser download shelf entry
settings.browserHideShelfDesc: Remove the cancelled row from the browser's shelf after handoff so the breadcrumb doesn't pile up.
settings.browserForwardCookiesDesc: Replay the cookies your browser would send so auth-gated CDNs keep working. Disable for a clean-room request.
settings.cardBrowserMinSizeDesc: Smaller downloads stay in the browser — they're rarely worth the segmented engine.
settings.browserMinSizeDesc: Files smaller than this stay in the browser shelf. Unknown sizes always capture.
settings.browserFileTypeInvalid: Use lowercase letters, digits, and dots only (max 8 chars).
settings.browserFileTypesEmptyHint: No file-type allowlist — every type the engine accepts is captured.
settings.browserAskBody: Set up this download and start it with Unduhin.
settings.browserRulesEmpty: No domain rules yet. Add one below to override the default handoff behaviour for a specific site.
settings.browserRulesImportConfirm: This will replace {currentBlock} blocked and {currentAllow} always-intercept rules with {nextBlock} blocked and {nextAllow} always-intercept rules from the file. The current rules are dropped.
settings.browserRulesImportInvalid: The selected file is not a valid Unduhin rules export.
settings.browserRulePatternInvalid: Use letters, digits, dots, and hyphens (optional leading *.).
settings.browserRulePatternDuplicate: That pattern is already in the rules list.
settings.cardBrowserClipboardDesc: Catch URLs you copy from anywhere — even outside the browser. Unduhin only checks the clipboard while this is on.
settings.browserClipboardToggle: Watch the clipboard for download URLs
settings.browserClipboardToggleDesc: When on, Unduhin reads the OS clipboard every ~1.5 seconds. URLs matching your file-type allowlist surface a one-click capture toast. Reads stay local; nothing is uploaded.
settings.browserClipboardEmptyFileTypes: Add at least one file type above to enable clipboard capture.
settings.clipboardCapturePrompt: Copied a link to {url} — capture it?
settings.browserPipeDownBanner: The handoff bridge is offline. Restart Unduhin or re-install the extension to recover.
settings.sectionMediaDesc: Manage the external tools Unduhin uses to download media from sites like YouTube, Vimeo, and Twitter.
settings.sectionCategoriesDesc: How Unduhin sorts your downloads. Each category has a default folder, an icon, and may have one rule that auto-assigns it by file extension.
settings.sectionAboutDesc: Version, updates, and the bits Unduhin is built on.
settings.cardFilesDesc: Where downloads land by default, and how the engine splits them up.
settings.cardRemovingDesc: What happens when you choose Remove on a finished download.
settings.cardBandwidthDesc: Cap shared across every active download.
settings.cardAppearanceDesc: Theme and locale used across the app.
settings.fileDefaultFolderDesc: New downloads land here unless a category overrides it.
settings.fileDefaultSegmentsDesc: How many ranges the engine requests in parallel. 8 is a good default.
settings.fileMaxConcurrentDesc: How many downloads can be active at once. Queued downloads wait.
settings.fileAlwaysAskFilenameDesc: When on, the Add URL dialog expands the filename field with the detected name pre-filled.
settings.removeActionDesc: Choose whether the Remove action also deletes the downloaded file from disk.
settings.bandwidthLimitDesc: Cap the total bandwidth Unduhin uses across all active downloads.
settings.themeDesc: Match the operating system, or pick a fixed appearance.
settings.languageDesc: Interface language. System follows your OS preference.
settings.languageRestartHint: Some surfaces (tray menu, native notifications) may need a restart to fully apply.
settings.cardStartupDesc: How Unduhin behaves when it launches and when you close the window.
settings.startupAutostartDesc: Open Unduhin automatically when you sign in to Windows.
settings.startupMinimizedDesc: Skip opening the main window on launch — Unduhin runs from the tray until you bring it up.
settings.closeBehaviourDesc: What the window's close (X) button does. Downloads keep running unless you exit.
settings.confirmOnQuit: Confirm when quitting with active downloads
settings.confirmOnQuitDesc: Show a confirmation prompt if you try to quit while downloads are in progress.
settings.cardNotificationsDesc: Which events fire native Windows toasts. The system gate is requested only on the first fired toast.
settings.notifyCompleteDesc: Fire a toast each time a download finishes.
settings.notifyFailDesc: Fire a toast each time a download terminally fails.
settings.notifyQueueEmptyDesc: Fire a toast once when the active set drains. Off by default.
settings.cardQuietHoursDesc: Mute toasts and tray-icon changes during a recurring daily window. Downloads keep running.
settings.cardTimeoutsDesc: How patient Unduhin is with slow or flaky servers before giving up.
settings.connectTimeoutDesc: Seconds to wait for the initial TCP handshake.
settings.readTimeoutDesc: Seconds to wait for the next byte once a connection is open.
settings.maxRetriesDesc: How many times the engine retries a transient failure before marking the download as failed.
settings.retryBackoffDesc: Initial delay (in ms) between retries. Doubles each attempt up to a cap.
settings.cardUserAgentDesc: HTTP User-Agent header sent with every request.
settings.userAgentPlaceholder: Leave empty to use the built-in Unduhin user agent.
settings.sectionTorrentDesc: How Unduhin's built-in BitTorrent engine connects to the swarm and where torrent content lands. Defaults are sane — touch these only if your network needs a fixed port or you want to seed.
settings.cardTorrentNetworkDesc: How the engine finds and connects to peers. DHT is required for trackerless magnets.
settings.torrentListenPortDesc: Port for inbound peer connections. Currently {auto}.
settings.torrentEnableDhtDesc: Distributed hash table. Required to resolve trackerless magnet links.
settings.torrentEnableUpnpDesc: Ask the router to forward the listen port so remote peers can reach you.
settings.torrentMaxPeersDesc: Upper bound on simultaneous peer connections for a single torrent.
settings.cardTorrentStorageDesc: Where torrent content is written. Resume state lives alongside it.
settings.torrentDownloadDirDesc: Empty falls back to the global default download folder.
settings.torrentDownloadDirPlaceholder: leave blank for the default download folder
settings.cardTorrentSeedingDesc: Whether Unduhin keeps uploading after a torrent finishes.
settings.torrentSeedRatioDesc: Keep seeding until uploads reach this multiple of the download. Off stops at 100%.
settings.cardYtdlpDesc: The bundled binary used to fetch from YouTube, Twitter, TikTok, and other media sites.
settings.ytdlpBinaryPathDesc: Point to an existing yt-dlp.exe on disk. Leave empty to use the managed install.
settings.ytdlpDefaultFormatDesc: yt-dlp format expression used when the formats dialog opens. bv*+ba/b is best video plus best audio, falling back to best combined.
settings.ytdlpProbeTimeoutDesc: How long Unduhin waits for yt-dlp to recognize a pasted URL before falling through to the regular engine.
settings.cardFfmpegDesc: Used to combine separate video and audio streams (typical for YouTube). Not needed for single-stream sites.
settings.ffmpegBinaryPathDesc: Point to an existing ffmpeg.exe on disk. Leave empty to use the managed install.
settings.mediaPrivacyFooter: yt-dlp connects directly to media sites — Unduhin never proxies your URL through our servers. Updates are not automatic; revisit this page to refresh.
settings.categoriesDialogHint: You can change everything later from the categories list.
settings.categoriesFolderPlaceholder: Optional — falls back to the global folder
settings.categoriesIconHint: Pick a colour + icon combo. The icon shows next to every download in this category.
settings.categoriesMakeRuleHint: Auto-file any download with these extensions into this category.
settings.categoriesListDesc: Click a row's edit button to rename or change folders. Drag rows to reorder.
settings.categoriesRulesDesc: If a download's file extension matches one of these, it's filed into that category.
settings.categoriesRulesOrderBody: If .zip sits in both Compressed and Programs, the topmost rule wins. The fallback rule at the bottom catches anything still unassigned.
settings.categoriesRulePendingPlaceholder: type extension and press Enter — e.g. epub
settings.categoriesDeleteHint: Existing downloads keep their assignment; only the category goes away.
settings.aboutDescription: A focused, segmented downloader for Windows. Fast on healthy servers, polite on small ones.
settings.aboutCardUpdatesDesc: How Unduhin updates itself and what (if anything) it sends home.
settings.aboutUpdateChannelDesc: Stable gets a release every 4–6 weeks. Beta is one week ahead and may include rougher builds.
settings.aboutBetaHint: Beta auto-update channel is not yet plumbed end-to-end. Until it is, check {link} for the latest beta build.
settings.aboutBetaHintPrefix: Beta auto-update channel is not yet plumbed end-to-end. Until it is, check
settings.aboutCheckOnStartupDesc: One quick HEAD-equivalent on launch. Disable if you bring your own update process.
settings.aboutCrashReportsDesc: If Unduhin crashes, send a stack trace + OS version. Never includes URLs, filenames, or proxy credentials.
settings.aboutUsageStatsDesc: Feature counts and timing — used to decide what to build next.
settings.aboutCardLinksDesc: Documentation, source, and where to yell about bugs.
settings.aboutLinkGithubDesc: The full source tree and issues.
settings.aboutLinkBugDesc: Open a ticket with reproduction steps.
settings.aboutLicencesDesc: Unduhin is built on the shoulders of giants. Showing {n} of {m}.

tray.popoverEmptyHint: Add a URL from the main window to get started.

errors.invalidUrl: That doesn't look like a URL.
errors.schedulePastTime: Pick a time in the future.
errors.openFile: Couldn't open {filename}. The file may have been moved or deleted.
errors.revealFile: Couldn't reveal the file in Explorer. It may have been moved or deleted.
